title: Quanta (PWR) Stock Sees 26.1% YTD Gains Amid Challenges
text: More demand for infrastructure solutions, aiding energy-transition efforts and modernization, drives growth for Quanta Services (PWR). Supply-chain woes are headwinds.

title: 7 Value Stocks to Buy Before They Pop Off

title: Quanta Services (PWR) Matches Q3 Earnings Estimates

title: Quanta Services (PWR) to Post Q3 Earnings: What to Expect
